business.name: Jerry's Painting & Wallpaper
business.tagline: Dallas's Trusted Painters for Over a Decade

seo.title: Jerry's Painting & Wallpaper | Expert Painters in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Jerry's Painting & Wallpaper offers premium interior and exterior painting services in Dallas. Free quotes, 5-star quality, and a decade of local experience.

hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Expert Craftsmanship
hero.subheadline: From interior accents to full exterior makeovers, we deliver flawless finishes that last.

featureSections.title: Breathe New Life Into Every Room
featureSections.body: Our meticulous interior painting service transforms your living spaces with clean lines, rich colors, and a smooth finish that stands the test of time.
bullets: Premium paints for durability and easy cleaning
Detailed prep including patching, sanding, and priming
Minimal disruption – we protect your furniture and floors
featureSections.cardBody: From bedrooms to kitchens, we make your vision a reality.

featureSections.title: Boost Curb Appeal and Protect Your Home
featureSections.body: Our exterior painting service not only beautifies your home but also shields it from Dallas weather with high-quality, weather-resistant coatings.
bullets: Thorough power washing and surface preparation
Caulking and sealing to prevent moisture damage
Long-lasting finishes that resist fading and peeling
featureSections.cardBody: Increase your home's value with a stunning exterior.

whyChooseUs.title: 10+ Years of Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas homes inside and out, from historic neighborhoods to new builds.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials Only
whyChooseUs.description: We use top-tier paints and supplies for a finish that lasts years, not months.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful Crew
whyChooseUs.description: Our team treats your home with care, leaving every room spotless after the job.

whyChooseUs.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy, we make it right – no questions asked.

testimonials.quote: Jerry's team painted our entire first floor and it looks amazing. They were punctual, professional, and the quality is outstanding.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We hired Jerry's for our exterior paint job. They prepped everything perfectly and the finish is beautiful. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: The crew was friendly and efficient. They transformed our kitchen cabinets with a flawless white finish. Couldn't be happier.
testimonials.author: Jessica P.

cta.headline: Ready to Transform Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free, no-obligation consultation today.

servicesPage.intro: From a single accent wall to a whole-home transformation, Jerry's Painting & Wallpaper delivers premium results for every project in Dallas.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Flawless interior painting for any room in your home.
services.longDescription: Our interior painting service covers every detail: from color consultation to final touch-ups. We use low-VOC paints for a safe, beautiful finish that lasts.
benefits: Transform your living space with fresh colors
Clean, odor-free process with low-VOC paints

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, measure the space, and recommend colors and finishes.

process.title: Preparation
process.description: We move furniture, patch holes, sand surfaces, and apply primer for a smooth base.

process.title: Painting & Cleanup
process.description: We apply two coats of premium paint with precise edging, then restore your room to perfection.

faqs.question: How long does interior painting take?
faqs.answer: A typical room takes 1-2 days, depending on size and preparation needed.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during painting?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. We can work around your schedule, but we recommend being available for color approval.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Durable, beautiful exterior coatings that protect and impress.
services.longDescription: Our exterior painting service revitalizes your home's curb appeal while providing a protective barrier against Dallas sun, rain, and wind.
benefits: Enhance curb appeal and property value
Protect against weather and moisture damage
Comprehensive surface prep for maximum adhesion

process.title: Inspection & Power Wash
process.description: We inspect surfaces for damage and power wash to remove dirt and old paint.

process.title: Repairs & Caulking
process.description: We repair wood rot, replace damaged siding, and caulk gaps to seal out moisture.

process.title: Primer & Paint
process.description: We apply high-quality primer and two coats of exterior paint for a durable, beautiful finish.

faqs.question: What type of paint do you use for exteriors?
faqs.answer: We use 100% acrylic latex paints that are UV-resistant and flexible to prevent cracking.

faqs.question: How long will my exterior paint job last?
faqs.answer: With proper preparation and quality paint, expect 5-10 years before needing a refresh.

services.title: Wallpaper Installation & Removal
services.shortDescription: Expert wallpaper services for any style.
services.longDescription: Whether you want bold patterns or subtle textures, our wallpaper experts ensure perfect alignment and bubble-free application. We also handle removal with care.
benefits: Wide selection of patterns and textures
Matching patterns and aligning repeats flawlessly

process.title: Consultation & Selection
process.description: We help you choose the perfect wallpaper and measure the space for accurate ordering.

process.title: Surface Preparation
process.description: We smooth walls, apply sizing, and ensure a clean, dry surface for adhesion.

process.title: Installation & Finishing
process.description: We hang wallpaper with precision, trim edges, and inspect for any imperfections.

faqs.question: Can you remove old wallpaper?
faqs.answer: Yes, we safely remove old wallpaper and prepare the wall for new paper or paint.

faqs.question: How long does wallpaper installation take?
faqs.answer: A standard room takes 1-3 days depending on complexity and pattern matching.

services.title: Cabinet Painting & Refinishing
services.shortDescription: Give your cabinets a brand-new look without replacement.
services.longDescription: Our cabinet painting service transforms your kitchen or bathroom cabinets with a durable, factory-like finish. We use specialized primers and paints for high-traffic areas.
benefits: Custom color matching to your decor
Quick turnaround – most kitchens done in 3-5 days

process.title: Removal & Cleaning
process.description: We remove doors and hardware, then clean and degrease all surfaces.

process.title: Sanding & Priming
process.description: We sand to promote adhesion and apply a high-bond primer to prevent bleed-through.

process.title: Spray Painting & Reassembly
process.description: We spray multiple thin coats for a smooth, even finish, then reinstall hardware and doors.

faqs.question: Do you paint the inside of cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can paint interiors for an additional fee, or leave them as-is.

faqs.question: How durable is the paint on cabinets?
faqs.answer: We use a catalyzed enamel that hardens to a tough, washable surface resistant to chips and stains.

about.headline: Bringing Color and Quality to Dallas Homes
about.mission: Our mission is simple: deliver exceptional painting services with integrity, craftsmanship, and a personal touch.
story: Jerry's Painting & Wallpaper started over a decade ago with a single goal: to provide Dallas homeowners with painting services that exceed expectations. Founded by Jerry himself, a lifelong painter with an eye for detail, the company grew through word-of-mouth and a commitment to quality. From small condos in Uptown to sprawling estates in Highland Park, we've painted it all.

Today, we're proud to be one of Dallas's most trusted painting companies. Our team undergoes continuous training, uses only the best materials, and treats every home like our own. We believe that a fresh coat of paint can transform not just a house, but the way you feel about your home. Let us show you the Jerry's difference.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in every brushstroke, ensuring flawless results every time.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time, communicate clearly, and finish projects as promised.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with the utmost respect, leaving it cleaner than we found it.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest assessments, fair pricing, and stand behind our work.

contact.headline: Let's Start Your Project
contact.subheadline: Reach out for a free, no-obligation quote. We'll discuss your vision and provide a detailed estimate.
